DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ROBERT YICK COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY-INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES - SET THREE, AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR IDENTIFICATION, INSPECTION, AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - SET THREE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT YCCA DE LAC CORPORATION SHALL PROVIDE CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERNST HALPERIN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Earl Lawrence Bohachek, 434.8100, appearing for the Plaintiff;
David Tillotson, Flynn Williams Riley, 415.461.1000, appearing for the Defendants.

Matter argued. Ruling: PLAINTIFF ROBERT YICK COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery is Granted in part. Plaintiff's Counsel is to prepare the order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery-Interrogatories And Document Requests
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Earl Bohachek, Esq., Tel. 415.434.8100, for plaintiff and moving party;
David B. Tillotson, Esq. of Flynn Williams Riley LLP, Tel. 415.461.1000, for defendants.

The court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF ROBERT YICK COMPANY, INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery-Interrogatories And Document Requests. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to plaintiff's specially prepared interrogatories - set three, and plaintiff's request for identification, inspection, and production of documents - set three is GRANTED. Defendant Ycca De Lac Corporation shall provide code-compliant responses without objection to plaintiff's specially prepared interrogatories and requests for production, and shall produce all responsive documents within 15 days of entry of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. Counsel for plaintiff to submit order. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

Ntc Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Dsiscovery Responses
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Earl Bohachek, 415.271.0143, appearing for the Plaintiff;
David Tillotson, Flynn Williams Riley, 415.461.1000, appearing for the Defendants Yucca De Lac and Fung Lum Express Corporation.

Ruling: A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF ROBERT YICK COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Discovery Responses is GRANTED per stipulation of the parties. Counsels are to produce a joint acceptable order to the Court. The request for sanctions is withdrawn. Nils Rosenquest, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302JPT
